title: Glass Candlestick Holder, Taper Candle Holders, Blue Crystal Glass Candle Holder for all Formal Events, Candlelight Dinner, Wedding, Dining, Party, Home Decoration
features: TIMELESS DESIGN - Vintage-inspired candle holder with an embossed diamond-shaped pattern and a polished finish reflecting candlelight beautifully. The transparent design complements any decor and highlights the warm glow of your candles.
HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL - Made from premium glass. Sturdy and durable, ensuring long-lasting use and enabling you to create beautiful centrepieces.

VERSATILE FIT - Sized to hold standard-sized taper candles securely. Ideal for dinners, celebrations, romantic evenings, Holiday & seasonal displays, and wedding centrepieces with florals and decorative inserts.
STURDY AND BALANCED BASE - Each holder is crafted with a wide, stable base to prevent tipping or sliding. Enjoy peace of mind during dinner parties or events.
PRODUCT DIMENSIONS - Each holder measures L: 8 x W: 8 x H: 11cm with an inner diameter of 2.5cm.
description: Illuminate your space with classic elegance. These Glass Candle Holders bring refined charm and graceful light to any setting. With a timeless design, they make a striking centerpiece for dining tables, mantels, weddings, or cozy corners.
